# Vibe Design Gallery

Base URL: https://45deg.github.io/vibe-design-gallery/

Use this index to choose one visual theme for restyling an existing interface with Tailwind CSS classes.

## How To Choose A Theme

Given the user's instructions, product context, target audience, brand tone, and any existing implementation details, select the single YAML file whose category, tone, cues, and tokens best match the intended interface.

Prefer themes that reinforce the user's product domain and emotional direction. For operational SaaS, dashboards, admin tools, finance, healthcare, and enterprise workflows, choose restrained, legible, task-focused themes. For games, campaigns, portfolios, restaurants, fashion, education, entertainment, and experimental prototypes, choose more expressive themes only when the context supports it.

After choosing a theme, use its `tokens` as the styling vocabulary. Preserve the provided HTML structure and text. Change only Tailwind class values unless the user explicitly asks for structural changes.

## Output Contract

- Return the finished implementation or rewritten class values requested by the user.
- Do not mention unused themes.
- Maintain accessibility: readable contrast, visible focus states, clear hover states, and disabled states.
- Keep spacing, typography, radius, borders, shadows, and component states consistent with the chosen YAML.

## Theme Files

### Commerce

- [07 Banking Pro](./07-banking-pro.yaml): Trustworthy, corporate, crisp. Cues: blue trust palette, clean inputs, financial dashboard, reserved tone, crisp cards.
- [13 Fintech Gradient](./13-fintech-gradient.yaml): Premium conversion UI. Cues: gradient CTAs, premium fintech, indigo and fuchsia, conversion-focused, smooth cards.
- [16 E-commerce Sale](./16-e-commerce-sale.yaml): Direct, energetic, retail. Cues: red sale palette, retail urgency, bold CTA, discount-badge mood, direct hierarchy.
- [22 Mediterranean](./22-mediterranean.yaml): Travel, hospitality, sunlit. Cues: coastal blue, sunlit orange, hospitality warmth, rounded booking cards, travel landing page.
- [26 Restaurant Menu](./26-restaurant-menu.yaml): Warm, artisanal, inviting. Cues: rose warmth, menu typography, artisan feel, soft food-brand controls, rounded tags.
- [30 Sports Energy](./30-sports-energy.yaml): Athletic, direct, punchy. Cues: orange energy, italic sports type, dark gym surfaces, performance dashboard, bold CTA.
- [34 Startup Coral](./34-startup-coral.yaml): Landing page, optimistic, warm. Cues: coral-orange CTA, startup landing page, optimistic tone, clean cards, growth-product warmth.
- [46 Crypto Neon Grid](./46-crypto-neon-grid.yaml): Speculative, high-energy, dark finance. Cues: dark finance, green and violet glow, terminal price board, speculative energy, neon controls.
- [47 Travel Postcard](./47-travel-postcard.yaml): Sunny, relaxed, travel-booking friendly. Cues: coastal sky, orange sun, postcard warmth, booking UI, vacation-friendly controls.
- [62 Craft Marketplace](./62-craft-marketplace.yaml): Handmade, friendly, creator-commerce oriented. Cues: handmade marketplace, warm tan, soft teal, creator commerce, artisan cards.
- [80 Denim Workwear](./80-denim-workwear.yaml): Rugged, durable, blue-collar chic. Cues: denim blue, orange stitching, sturdy fabric, apparel commerce, copper rivets.
- [99 Tropical Vibe](./99-tropical-vibe.yaml): Vacation, fruity, vibrant, energetic. Cues: teal and flamingo pink, summer vacation, lush leaves, tropical juice, bright commerce.

### Editorial

- [06 Editorial Serif](./06-editorial-serif.yaml): Magazine-like, typographic. Cues: serif text, paper background, thin rules, magazine hierarchy, classic editorial rhythm.
- [17 Monochrome Agency](./17-monochrome-agency.yaml): Portfolio, decisive, graphic. Cues: black and white, agency portfolio, strong typographic contrast, hard edges, graphic composition.
- [20 Pastel Academic](./20-pastel-academic.yaml): Notes, study, gentle hierarchy. Cues: pastel purple, study notes, gentle academic UI, soft badges, low-stress controls.
- [24 Paper Ledger](./24-paper-ledger.yaml): Archive, invoices, documentation. Cues: aged paper, ledger forms, warm amber, document archive, invoice-style controls.
- [37 Swiss Grid](./37-swiss-grid.yaml): Precise, modular, typographic. Cues: Swiss typography, red accent, grid discipline, modular panels, objective editorial tone.
- [42 Handwritten Notebook](./42-handwritten-notebook.yaml): Notebook, study notes, human and informal. Cues: paper feel, ink-like text, blue-line notebook, casual annotations, soft educational UI.
- [48 Academic Journal](./48-academic-journal.yaml): Dense, scholarly, reserved. Cues: formal serif, paper neutrality, scholarly density, quiet borders, research publication.
- [84 Typewriter Paper](./84-typewriter-paper.yaml): Analog writing, ink ribbon, imperfect alignment. Cues: typewriter font, cream paper, smudged black ink, author draft, raw manuscript.

### Enterprise

- [21 Data Dense](./21-data-dense.yaml): Compact, technical, analytical. Cues: dense analytics, compact spacing, monospace labels, small-radius controls, data-table temperament.
- [33 Command Center](./33-command-center.yaml): Mission control, dense, serious. Cues: mission control, dark enterprise, cyan status, operational density, technical monitoring.
- [44 Industrial Ops](./44-industrial-ops.yaml): Operational, heavy-duty, utilitarian. Cues: hazard amber, machine-room UI, dense operations, robust controls, utilitarian hierarchy.
- [52 Blueprint Enterprise](./52-blueprint-enterprise.yaml): Structured, architectural, planning-oriented. Cues: blueprint blues, technical labels, precise spacing, planning UI, architectural grid.
- [59 Executive Boardroom](./59-executive-boardroom.yaml): Formal, composed, C-suite reporting. Cues: executive dashboard, navy palette, formal hierarchy, subtle gold, boardroom restraint.
- [63 Warehouse Scanner](./63-warehouse-scanner.yaml): Barcode scanner, logistics, rugged mobile workflow. Cues: warehouse operations, scanner UI, yellow black safety, large touch targets, rugged workflow.
- [74 Space Station](./74-space-station.yaml): Aerospace, utilitarian, high-reliability. Cues: NASA aesthetic, pure white panels, red hazard accents, technical sans-serif, aeronautical displays.
- [88 Aviation Control](./88-aviation-control.yaml): Air traffic control, high-stakes visibility. Cues: radar screen, amber and cyan on dark, aviation dashboard, high visibility, critical readouts.

### Experimental

- [38 Bauhaus Grid](./38-bauhaus-grid.yaml): Geometric, poster-like, primary-color driven. Cues: strict geometry, primary accents, modular layout, hard edges, Bauhaus poster language.
- [39 Memphis Party](./39-memphis-party.yaml): Chaotic, playful, decorative, high-energy. Cues: confetti accents, asymmetry, bold color pops, graphic contrast, fun rounded forms.
- [57 Noir Detective](./57-noir-detective.yaml): Moody, monochrome, cinematic investigation UI. Cues: film noir, high contrast grayscale, typewriter feel, shadow-heavy cards, case-file mood.
- [67 Cyberpunk Street](./67-cyberpunk-street.yaml): Gritty, glowing, rebellious. Cues: neon yellow, dark grunge, high-tech low-life, street style, asymmetrical borders.
- [69 Clay Brutalism](./69-clay-brutalism.yaml): Chunky, heavy, thick yet soft. Cues: thick rounded borders, heavy shadows, clay colors, bold but soft, tactile heft.
- [73 Biomechanical](./73-biomechanical.yaml): Alien, organic machinery, dark, unsettling. Cues: dark green tones, organic curves mixed with sharp edges, alien UI, Giger-esque, dark metallic.
- [92 Brutalist Web](./92-brutalist-web.yaml): Raw HTML, default styles, anti-design. Cues: standard blue links, Times New Roman, pure white background, no rounded corners, raw early web.
- [94 Pop Art Comic](./94-pop-art-comic.yaml): Lichtenstein, halftone dots, primary colors, loud. Cues: halftone dots, primary red and blue, thick black outlines, pop art, comic strip panels.

### Futuristic

- [02 Glass Aurora](./02-glass-aurora.yaml): Blurred, luminous, layered. Cues: frosted glass, deep gradients, aurora glow, transparent surfaces, soft luminous CTAs.
- [04 Cyber Terminal](./04-cyber-terminal.yaml): Command-line, sharp, electric. Cues: black terminal, green phosphor, monospace, scanline mood, thin glowing borders.
- [36 AI Glow](./36-ai-glow.yaml): AI product, luminous, smooth. Cues: AI product, violet cyan gradient, soft glow, dark intelligence surface, smooth rounded controls.
- [61 Holographic Lab](./61-holographic-lab.yaml): Scientific, translucent, holographic interface. Cues: holographic panels, scientific UI, cyan violet shimmer, thin glass borders, lab console.
- [71 Neon Tokyo](./71-neon-tokyo.yaml): Nighttime metropolis, glowing signs, rainy streets. Cues: magenta and cyan, black background, neon glow, midnight city, high contrast digital.
- [77 Holographic HUD](./77-holographic-hud.yaml): Sci-fi interface, glowing projections, transparent. Cues: pure cyan, hologram projection, no solid backgrounds, thin glowing lines, sci-fi helmet UI.

### Gaming

- [19 Gaming HUD](./19-gaming-hud.yaml): Angular, high contrast, competitive. Cues: HUD interface, angular clipped panels, cyan glow, competitive game UI, sharp technical labels.
- [51 Arcade Cabinet](./51-arcade-cabinet.yaml): Arcade machine, bold gaming nostalgia. Cues: deep navy, purple, cyan, yellow, fuchsia, pixel-era energy.
- [55 Tactical Military](./55-tactical-military.yaml): Rugged, mission-oriented, olive interface. Cues: olive drab, military HUD, rugged controls, stencil typography, mission dashboard.
- [76 Pixel Art RPG](./76-pixel-art-rpg.yaml): 16-bit, nostalgic, fantasy adventure. Cues: chunky borders, pixelated fonts, RPG menu box, white inside black, fantasy game UI.
- [90 Racing Dashboard](./90-racing-dashboard.yaml): Motorsport, carbon fiber, high speed, adrenaline. Cues: carbon fiber dark, racing red, italic speedometer font, bold斜体, track telemetry.

### Luxury

- [03 Quiet Luxury](./03-quiet-luxury.yaml): Elegant, spacious, restrained. Cues: dark stone palette, fine borders, serif typography, amber accents, generous spacing.
- [29 Luxury Beauty](./29-luxury-beauty.yaml): Beauty brand, premium, soft. Cues: pink noir, beauty brand, soft serif, premium cosmetics, delicate translucent panels.
- [35 Museum Wall](./35-museum-wall.yaml): Gallery, quiet, cultured. Cues: gallery wall, neutral plinth, fine serif, museum labels, quiet cultural restraint.
- [45 Paris Fashion](./45-paris-fashion.yaml): Editorial luxury, fashion-house restraint. Cues: black and ivory, fashion editorial, fine borders, serif elegance, ample negative space.
- [49 Art Deco Gold](./49-art-deco-gold.yaml): Ornamental, cinematic, gilded. Cues: black lacquer, gold accents, vintage glamour, fine line detail, cinematic luxury.
- [64 Luxury Watch](./64-luxury-watch.yaml): Precision, black steel, premium instrument feel. Cues: black steel, precision instrument, premium watch UI, fine tick marks, metallic restraint.
- [83 High-end Audio](./83-high-end-audio.yaml): Audiophile equipment, brushed metal, glowing LEDs. Cues: brushed aluminum, dark grey amp, orange LED glow, knobs and switches, premium hardware.
- [85 Tarot Card](./85-tarot-card.yaml): Mystical, ornate, deeply colored, occult. Cues: deep indigo, gold leaf borders, mystical symmetry, arcane symbols, esoteric aesthetic.
- [93 Gothic Architecture](./93-gothic-architecture.yaml): Dark, vaulted, stained glass, solemn. Cues: dark stone, crimson red, arched geometry, solemn atmosphere, cathedral aesthetics.

### Minimal

- [00 Soft SaaS](./00-soft-saas.yaml): Calm dashboard UI. Cues: light neutrals, quiet hierarchy, rounded cards, subtle shadows, enterprise SaaS polish.
- [09 Dark Product](./09-dark-product.yaml): Modern app, dark-first. Cues: dark neutrals, zinc surfaces, low glare, clean app shell, compact SaaS controls.
- [11 Nordic Frost](./11-nordic-frost.yaml): Cold, airy, subdued. Cues: pale sky tones, lightweight typography, minimal borders, cold airiness, restrained controls.
- [32 Desert Minimal](./32-desert-minimal.yaml): Warm, spacious, subdued. Cues: sand palette, warm neutrals, quiet luxury-lite, large radii, spacious cards.
- [97 Minimalist Portfolio](./97-minimalist-portfolio.yaml): Art gallery, severe restraint, stark contrast. Cues: pure white and black, extreme negative space, gallery wall, no decorative elements, content-first.

### Mobile

- [15 Translucent Mobile](./15-translucent-mobile.yaml): Native, translucent, polished. Cues: translucent mobile surfaces, frosted panels, rounded controls, blue accents, soft native depth.
- [53 Adaptive Mobile](./53-adaptive-mobile.yaml): Personalized, rounded, adaptive mobile feel. Cues: adaptive rounded UI, large rounded shapes, muted adaptive color, soft mobile surfaces, friendly system UI.
- [54 Pro Productivity App](./54-pro-productivity-app.yaml): Native desktop and tablet productivity polish. Cues: native platform app, soft gray chrome, blue accent, translucent toolbar feel, precise typography.

### Nature

- [18 Nature Organic](./18-nature-organic.yaml): Warm, sustainable, soft. Cues: organic greens, sustainable product, rounded natural forms, soft earth contrast, botanical calm.
- [43 Zen Garden](./43-zen-garden.yaml): Quiet, breathable, natural, low-stimulus. Cues: earthy neutrals, soft green, ample whitespace, low contrast, calm rounded forms.
- [50 Oceanic Dashboard](./50-oceanic-dashboard.yaml): Marine, clean, research-instrument calm. Cues: marine blues, aqua accents, research instrument, fluid gradients, scientific calm.
- [58 Solarpunk Civic](./58-solarpunk-civic.yaml): Optimistic, ecological, civic technology. Cues: solarpunk, warm green, civic dashboard, optimistic sustainability, sunlit gradients.
- [68 Glassmorphic Winter](./68-glassmorphic-winter.yaml): Cold, icy, translucent, pristine. Cues: frosted ice, winter blues, blur effects, white borders, crisp translucent cards.
- [79 Matcha Minimal](./79-matcha-minimal.yaml): Japanese tea ceremony, tranquil, balanced. Cues: matcha green, off-white paper, wabi-sabi, extreme minimalism, peaceful space.
- [87 Terracotta Desert](./87-terracotta-desert.yaml): Earthy, baked clay, warm arid climate. Cues: burnt orange, baked clay, arid earth, warm rust, organic rough texture.
- [95 Underwater Deep](./95-underwater-deep.yaml): Abyssal, bioluminescent, mysterious, flowing. Cues: deep ocean blue, bioluminescent cyan, flowing gradients, dark aquatic, abyssal calm.
- [98 Golden Hour](./98-golden-hour.yaml): Warm, luminous, fading sunlight, romantic. Cues: golden hour light, amber to orange gradients, soft long shadows, warmth, evening sun.

### Playful

- [01 Neo Brutalist](./01-neo-brutalist.yaml): Bold, loud, tactile. Cues: heavy black outlines, offset shadows, flat bright color, no subtlety, poster-like controls.
- [05 Candy Pop](./05-candy-pop.yaml): Bright, friendly, rounded. Cues: bubble radii, pink and cyan, friendly contrast, soft candy colors, playful badges.
- [10 Claymorphism](./10-claymorphism.yaml): Soft, puffy, physical. Cues: puffy controls, warm orange, inner shadows, soft plastic, rounded tactile components.
- [28 Kids Learning](./28-kids-learning.yaml): Friendly, chunky, educational. Cues: chunky controls, primary classroom palette, friendly buttons, large radii, educational app mood.
- [56 Kawaii Mascot UI](./56-kawaii-mascot-ui.yaml): Cute, soft, friendly, sticker-like. Cues: kawaii softness, pastel stickers, rounded pill controls, friendly badges, gentle playful hierarchy.
- [60 Comic Panel](./60-comic-panel.yaml): Graphic-novel UI with energetic interaction. Cues: comic book, thick ink outlines, speech-bubble badges, yellow panels, action-oriented typography.
- [81 Pastel Goth](./81-pastel-goth.yaml): Cute but dark, spooky pastel, alternative. Cues: black and pastel pink, creepy cute, sharp dark edges with soft colors, alternative teen, gothic lolita.
- [82 Candy Glass](./82-candy-glass.yaml): Sweet, hyper-glossy, semi-transparent pops. Cues: glossy candy, translucent pastels, jelly UI, hyper-friendly, rounded highlights.
- [89 Anime Cel](./89-anime-cel.yaml): Flat colors, cel-shaded, animated sky. Cues: Studio Ghibli sky, flat cel shading, pure bright colors, clean line art, anime aesthetic.

### Retro

- [12 Retro Console](./12-retro-console.yaml): Old screen, pixel mood. Cues: CRT terminal, lime phosphor, pixel-era styling, monospace controls, low-fi screen glow.
- [23 Vaporwave](./23-vaporwave.yaml): Neon, nostalgic, surreal. Cues: pink cyan neon, retro-futurism, surreal gradient, synthwave mood, glowing dark panels.
- [40 Skeuomorphic Desktop](./40-skeuomorphic-desktop.yaml): Physical controls, raised surfaces, classic app chrome. Cues: raised buttons, inset shadows, desktop-era UI, tactile gray panels, classic application chrome.
- [41 Y2K Chrome](./41-y2k-chrome.yaml): Chrome, glossy, futuristic nostalgia. Cues: metallic surfaces, bubble radii, icy gradients, late-90s futurism, glossy buttons.
- [65 80s Synthpop](./65-80s-synthpop.yaml): Vibrant, nostalgic, energetic. Cues: fuchsia and cyan, neon grids, 80s nostalgia, high contrast, vibrant synthetic palette.
- [70 Medieval Parchment](./70-medieval-parchment.yaml): Historical, lore-rich, worn paper. Cues: parchment paper, brown ink, serif typography, fantasy lore, ancient documents.
- [72 Retro Diner](./72-retro-diner.yaml): 1950s Americana, upbeat, classic food joint. Cues: cherry red, mint green, chrome accents, 50s diner, cheerful nostalgia.
- [75 Steampunk Brass](./75-steampunk-brass.yaml): Victorian machinery, brass and leather, intricate. Cues: brass gold, dark leather brown, clockwork, ornate borders, Victorian industrial.
- [78 Sunset Synthwave](./78-sunset-synthwave.yaml): Warm gradients, 80s dusk, driving arcade. Cues: orange to purple gradient, synthwave sun, warm neon, retro arcade dusk, grid lines.
- [86 Classic Desktop 95](./86-classic-desktop-95.yaml): Classic OS, nostalgic, functional gray. Cues: teal background, gray dialogs, bevel borders, pixelated functionalism, 1995 PC.
- [96 Vintage Camera](./96-vintage-camera.yaml): Mechanical, textured leather, precise silver dials. Cues: black pebbled leather, brushed silver, red dot accent, rangefinder, photographic instrument.

### System

- [08 Healthcare Calm](./08-healthcare-calm.yaml): Clean, accessible, clinical. Cues: teal accents, clinical calm, high readability, soft white surfaces, accessible controls.
- [14 Material Clean](./14-material-clean.yaml): Familiar, structured, practical. Cues: material design, standard elevation, blue focus, functional controls, straightforward hierarchy.
- [25 High Contrast A11y](./25-high-contrast-a11y.yaml): Accessible, explicit, readable. Cues: maximum contrast, strong focus rings, black outlines, readability first, clear interaction states.
- [27 Developer Docs](./27-developer-docs.yaml): Technical, readable, reference-style. Cues: developer docs, dark reference UI, monospace labels, violet accents, code-adjacent hierarchy.
- [31 Desktop Fluent](./31-desktop-fluent.yaml): Desktop-like, neutral, efficient. Cues: desktop shell, neutral grays, blue action color, efficient density, familiar enterprise UI.
- [66 E-ink Reader](./66-e-ink-reader.yaml): Grayscale, eye-friendly, distraction-free. Cues: e-ink display, pure grayscale, no anti-aliasing feel, high legibility, monochrome ink.
- [91 Neumorphic Light](./91-neumorphic-light.yaml): Soft plastic, extruded surfaces, uniform color. Cues: neumorphism, same color background and surface, drop shadow and inner shadow, soft extruded plastic, minimalist pop.
